---
name: Security-sensitive report
title: "security: "
labels: security
---

If the report includes a real secret, real recovery share, passphrase, exploit details that should stay private, or recovered secret output, do not post it in a public issue.

Open a minimal issue without sensitive material, or contact the maintainer privately before sharing details.

## Public summary


## Affected area

- [ ] Core library
- [ ] CLI
- [ ] TUI
- [ ] Web UI
- [ ] Desktop app
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Release packaging
